headers.value: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.hcaptcha.com https://hcaptcha.com; script-src 'self' https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; frame-src https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com;
